description_html:
Design smart. Design bold. Design to win.
Step into the world of digital design and engineering excellence with our CAD Design Challenge — a high-intensity, individual and team-based competition crafted for creative problem-solvers and future engineers. This event will be conducted in both offline (on-campus) and online modes, allowing participants to join from anywhere. Participants will be provided with a real-world CAD design problem statement along with detailed technical specifications and constraints through the event platform, UNSTOP. Using appropriate CAD tools, teams must analyze the problem, conceptualize solutions, and develop accurate 3D models of functional components that satisfy the given requirements. Participants attending online will submit their designs digitally within the given time. Designs will be evaluated based on dimensional accuracy, creativity, and sound engineering logic. This event tests not just your CAD skills, but your ability to think, collaborate, and design under pressure — whether you participate physically or virtually. 

RULES:-

  • Solo or a team of 2 can participate (offline or online).
  • Only CAD software (AutoCAD, SolidWorks, Fusion 360, CATIA, etc.) is
    allowed.
  • Internet access may be restricted for offline participants unless stated
    otherwise.
  • Online participants must ensure stable internet connectivity.
  • Designs must strictly follow the given problem statement and constraints.
  • Plagiarism or use of ready-made designs will lead to immediate
    disqualification.
  • Participants must submit their final design within the allocated time limit
    through the designated submission portal/email.
  • Online participants may be monitored through virtual platforms during the
    event.
  • The decision of the judges will be final and binding.

Awards:

  • 1st Prize – Rs. 5000
  • 2nd Prize – Rs. 3000
  • 3rd Prize – Rs. 2000

Prizes are applicable for both online and offline participants.
location: Indian Institute of Information Technology, Design and Manufacturing, Kancheepuram
